nasb.text: So I prophesied as He commanded me, and the breath came into them, and they came to life and stood on their feet, an exceedingly great army.

esv.text: So I prophesied as he commanded me, and the breath came into them, and they lived and stood on their feet, an exceedingly great army.

cnv.text: 於是我遵命說預言，氣息就進入骸骨裡面，骸骨就活過來，並且站起，成了一支極大的軍隊。

ccb.text: 于是，我便按耶和华的吩咐说预言，气息就进入他们里面，他们便复活了，并且站立起来，成为一支大军。
